title: 25:17 ГўВҖВ” August 6, 2025
body_text:
25:17 ГўВҖВ” August 6, 2025
Update to ICBC AgentsГўВҖВҷ Deposits (BC) Part
The ICBC AgentsГўВҖВҷ Deposits (BC) Part has been edited and reorganized. As a result, some chapters have been renamed and sections renumbered. Users are now referred to the Deposit Processing Part for content related to processing cheques included in ICBC agentsГўВҖВҷ deposits. We also added procedures for ordering MICR encoded ICBC service charge debits via ServiceNow.
Minor changes were made to ICBC Deposit Slip, Form 1126, and ICBC AgentГўВҖВҷs Transit/Account Number Update, Form 2344.
Clearing and Deposits Volume
ICBC AgentsГўВҖВҷ Deposits (BC) Part
Section 1.3, ICBC AgentsГўВҖВҷ Deposits Document Library
We removed the reference to Branch Capture ГўВҖВ“ Capture User Guide, Form 5914, as the form was made obsolete. Users should refer to the Deposit Processing Part for Branch Capture procedures.
Section 3.2, Operating an ICBC AgentГўВҖВҷs Account
New section.
Section 3.5, Reimbursement for an ICBC AgentГўВҖВҷs Account Service Charges
We added procedures for requesting MICR Encoded ICBC service charge debits via ServiceNow. Referred users to the Deposit Processing Part for procedures on processing ICBC service charge debits in Branch Capture.
Section 5.2, Verifying and Processing an ICBC AgentГўВҖВҷs Deposits
We referred users to the Deposit Processing Part for procedures on verifying cheques for deposit and processing cheques included in an ICBC agentГўВҖВҷs deposit.
Section 6.3, Managing Chargebacks for an ICBC AgentГўВҖВҷs Account
We referred users to the Deposit Processing Part for information on entering return information in Branch Capture for cheques included in an ICBC AgentГўВҖВҷs deposit.
Chapter 7, Settlement of ICBC AgentsГўВҖВҷ Accounts
We referred users to the Deposit Processing Part for information on settlement and deposit adjustments for cheques processed in Branch Capture.
